title: Lex's Dragons
description: This mod adds a variety of Dragons!
body:
# Lex's Dragons
## **What does this mod do?**
Have you ever thought: What if Mojang added dragons to the game?
Well, this mod adds exactly that!

This mod adds dragons to Minecraft without making them feel out of place
The dragons are craftable with vanilla-Minecraft materials. _see screenshots for the recipes_

This mod adds custom items to the game that are related to the dragons such as wands and other items. 
### **Features**
- Rideable dragons, that can fly
- Keybinds for anyone that isn't comfortable flying with spacebar and r
- Current dragons in the mod:
  - The Horned Wyvern
  - The Albino dragon
  - The Ice Dragon
  - The Amethyst Wyvern
- Custom materials such as:
  - The pale ore
  - The Amethyst Gemstone
- Recipes for dragons _see screenshots_

### Special Abilities
Some Dragons have special abilities, while this is still a work in progress here are some abilities that dragons have:
- Albino Dragon
  - The Abino Dragon drops a Pale ore which, at the moment unfortunatly does nothing. _work in progress_!
- Ice Dragon
  - The Ice Dragon has the Ability to walk on water! 
- Amethyst Wyvern
  - The Amethyst dragon drops an Amethyst Gemstone, with the Amethyst gemstone, you can craft a staff which has the ability to cast a spell!

## **Community**
Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/X92BXwawpf)!
